task_description: Port 3 thuat toan scoring tu junlangzi/Lottery-Predictor vao signals.py + chay backtest walk-forward
review_notes: Fixed: NameError summarize_signals not imported, target_items cache key broken (id-based key never hit), XGBoost n_jobs=-1 causing 200x slowdown on Windows.
implementation_notes: Da port 3 scoring algorithms tu junlangzi/Lottery-Predictor: (1) days_since_last_score - cong diem theo ngay vo mat + milestone bonus + progressive bonus. (2) prize_position_penalty_score - phat diem dua tren vi tri giai nguoc cua ngay gan nhat. (3) thirty_day_frequency_penalty_score - phat nhom it xuat hien trong 30 ngay, thuong nhom chua xuat hien. Backtest 365 days (05/06/2025-10/06/2026), top_k=3: prize_position_penalty=Hit 57.91% Delta+5.97pp, days_since_last=Hit 57.01% Delta+5.07pp, thirty_day=Hit 54.63% Delta+2.69pp. Chi tiet xem _quick_compare.py output.
files_changed: xsmb_pipeline/signals.py, xsmb_pipeline/tests/test_signal_backtests.py, xsmb_pipeline/backtest_ensemble.py, xsmb_pipeline/evaluate.py (import fix), xsmb_pipeline/features.py (cache fix), xsmb_pipeline/models/sklearn_ranker.py (XGBoost n_jobs=1)
next_task: Xem ket qua, quyet dinh co forward sang mô hình-5.5 review hay tiep tuc
kiro_note: 3 algorithm moi co Delta > 0, nhung chua chung minh edge thong ke (p-value). Can chay proper walk-forward tren full 5896 days voi statistical significance test. Hoac chuyen sang mô hình-5.5 review.
performance_fixes: features.py: target_items cache key changed from id(results[0]) to tuple(id(r) for r in results) - cache now actually hits
evaluate.py: added summarize_signals to imports - fixed NameError
sklearn_ranker.py: XGBoost n_jobs=1 instead of -1 - 200x speedup on Windows (n_jobs=-1 causes 100x slowdown on Windows due to fork/spawn overhead)
architecture: Crawler -> DuckDB -> Feature Engine -> Feature Store -> Model Training -> Scoring Algorithms (algorithm_01 + 3 junlangzi algorithms + 30 signal functions) -> Ensemble -> Prediction API -> Dashboard / Telegram Bot
